checklist.text: Specification DOCX assembled in USPTO section order for review.
checklist.evidence: docs/legal/SCBE_NONPROVISIONAL_SPEC_v1.docx and patent-workbench/assembled/SCBE_NONPROVISIONAL_SPEC_DRAFT_v1.docx. 399 paragraphs, ~67 KB, 25 claims, 9 figures per local manifest.

checklist.text: Spec section order verified against USPTO 8-section order.
checklist.evidence: Audited assembled MD 2026-05-28: line 1 Title, line 3 Cross-Reference (63/961,403 cited), line 7 Background, line 41 Summary, line 51 Brief Description of Drawings, line 71 Detailed Description, line 1126 Claims, line 1338 Abstract. All 8 required sections present in correct order.

checklist.text: Priority claim to provisional 63/961,403 present in spec and ADS draft.
checklist.evidence: Cross-Reference section in assembled spec (line 3) cites 63/961,403, filed 2026-01-15. ADS draft at patent-workbench/ADS_PTO_AIA_14_DRAFT.md Section 4 contains domestic benefit claim under 35 U.S.C. 119(e). Must be entered in Patent Center ADS fields at filing.

checklist.text: Independent and total claim counts checked for fee impact.
checklist.evidence: 26 total claims, 3 independent (claims 1, 9, 15), 23 dependent, 0 multiple-dependent. Micro-entity fees: $70 filing + $154 search + $176 exam = $400 base; 6 extra claims (21-26) x $40 = $240; total $640. Claim 26 added 2026-05-28: bijective token alphabet per tongue axis covering Sacred Tongues 16x16 prefix-suffix grid. No paper surcharge, no non-DOCX surcharge, no multiple-dependent surcharge.

checklist.text: Fixed claims v3 produced with all inaccuracies resolved and production-unclaimed features added.
checklist.evidence: PATENT_CLAIMS_FIXED_v3.md created 2026-05-28. Claim 1 whereby clause rewritten (bounded exponential pi^(phi*d*), not superexponential; distance from centroid not proximity to boundary). Claim 3 adds species (iii) pi^(phi*d). Claim 21 reformulated from 5-predicate to N-predicate >=3 tracking actual 3-ring sacred_eggs.py. Claim 23 REPLACED EMA tau formula (archive only) with REROUTE 5th-decision-mode (production _check_reroute + DEFAULT_REROUTES). Claim 24 REPLACED Hopfield quadratic form (archive only) with null-space anomaly detection (production _null_space_anomaly lines 807-835). All other claims retained verbatim. CIP deferred items documented in v3 section 'What Has Been Deferred'. Fee unchanged: $600. NEXT: apply claim 1 whereby-clause fix to spec DOCX claims section before filing.

checklist.text: Claim 1 formula language verified against _harmonic_cost implementation and corrected.
checklist.evidence: Audited runtime_gate.py _harmonic_cost lines 889-899: cost = PI^(PHI * d_star) where d_star = min(weighted_dist, 5.0), PHI=1.618, PI=pi. This is a BOUNDED EXPONENTIAL (cost at d*=0 is 1.0, at d*=1 is ~5.05, at d*=5 is ~9,070). It is NOT superexponential. Claim 1 'whereby' clause corrected in PATENT_CLAIMS_FIXED_v3.md to read 'follows a function of the form B^(k*d)... increases monotonically as the embedded point deviates from the session centroid'. Spec DOCX claims section must be updated to match before filing (see spec_docx_whereby_updated).

checklist.text: Spec DOCX claim 1 whereby clause updated to match fixed claims v3.
checklist.evidence: Applied 2026-05-28. build_patent_docx.py CLAIMS array updated: claim 1 whereby -> B^(k*d) bounded-exponential language; claim 3 adds species (iii) pi^(phi*d); claim 21 N-predicate >=3 (semantic/geometric/crypto); claim 23 REROUTE replacing EMA tau; claim 24 null-space anomaly replacing Hopfield. SCBE_NONPROVISIONAL_SPEC_v1.docx rebuilt and committed (a4f5167cf). Assembled MD also updated.

Must be signed in Patent Center at filing (electronically or by PDF upload). Micro Entity Certification (PTO/SB/15A) filed ~2026-03-02; re-verify eligibility on filing day.

checklist.text: Micro entity eligibility re-verified at filing; PTO/SB/15A current.
checklist.evidence: PTO/SB/15A signed ~2026-03-02 per prior email record (Gmail msg 19cb262145405494). Must re-verify on filing day: <=4 prior U.S. utility/design/plant apps as inventor, gross income below USPTO threshold (~$258K FY2026), no large-entity assignment obligation. Provisional filings do not count toward the 4-application limit.

checklist.text: Drawings FIG 1-9 cover each feature claimed in independent claims.
checklist.evidence: FIG_1 through FIG_9 exist as PNG + PDF. Brief Description of Drawings section present in spec. Spot-check needed: verify Poincare embedding, session centroid, hyperbolic distance computation, four-way governance decision, fail-to-noise path, and PQC receipt are each shown in at least one figure. FIG numbers must match figure-reference text in Detailed Description.

checklist.text: Every claim element mapped to written-description support in spec.
checklist.evidence: Claims v3 support notes: Claims 1-20 and 25 have strong code-level support documented in PATENT_CLAIMS_FIXED_v3.md per-claim notes. Claim 21 (N-predicate, 3-ring sacred_eggs.py) and claim 22 have solid production support. Claim 23 (REROUTE: _check_reroute + DEFAULT_REROUTES) and claim 24 (null-space anomaly: _null_space_anomaly lines 807-835) are newly grounded in production code. Still needed: verify Detailed Description in spec DOCX explicitly describes the reroute decision mode and null-space anomaly detection by name or sufficiently close description, to avoid 112(a) written-description rejection.

checklist.text: Post-2026-01-15 improvements separated from provisional-supported material.
checklist.evidence: CIP analysis complete in PATENT_CLAIMS_FIXED_v3.md 'What Has Been Deferred to CIP' section. Deferred: EMA swarm trust formula (archive only), Hopfield energy exact form (archive only), trichromatic governance (opt-in only), Tree of Escalation as decider (observational only), full 14-layer ordered composition claim, Sacred Tongues tokenizer (separate invention). Claims 21-25 in the v3 fixed set are grounded in production code or accepted as getting non-provisional date. Decision: include all 25 claims and accept that 21/23/24 receive the non-provisional filing date (not Jan 15, 2026 priority date) unless the provisional covers them — USPTO assigns the earliest supported date per claim during examination.

checklist.text: Prior-art search log completed and IDS decision made.
checklist.evidence: prior_art_search_log.md exists. Completeness unknown. Minimum: Google Patents search for 'hyperbolic geometry authorization', 'Poincare ball security', 'post-quantum cryptographic receipt', top-10 results logged. IDS (Information Disclosure Statement) decision required: if you found relevant art, it should be disclosed.

checklist.text: Non-publication request decision made.
checklist.evidence: Decision 2026-05-28: NO non-publication request. Application publishes normally ~18 months after earliest priority date (2027-07-15). Rationale: SCBE has international applicability (South Korea, EU); PCT/foreign filing remains possible; requesting non-publication then filing foreign triggers strict USPTO consequences that are easy to mishandle pro se. Do NOT check the non-publication box in Patent Center.

checklist.text: Benchmark/test evidence packet prepared for prosecution support.
checklist.evidence: resonant_thought_lattice_benchmark.json shows baseline_mean=0.615 vs lattice_mean=0.9163, delta=0.3013, 7/8 improved. This supports utility and non-obviousness arguments. Optional: package Petri gate recall results (97.7% after KO gate) as informal evidence. Not filed with application but used during examination responses.

checklist.text: Source-code appendix/pseudocode decision made.
checklist.evidence: USPTO permits computer-readable form (CRF) appendix on CD/flash (37 CFR 1.52(e)) but it is rarely filed for software patents. More common: embed pseudocode in the specification. Verify Detailed Description includes enough pseudocode/flowchart description that claims can be fully understood without the source code. Source code itself is not required and creates prior-art publication risk.

checklist.text: Inventor/applicant ownership posture confirmed.
checklist.evidence: SAM.gov registration shows sole proprietor. No employment agreement that would require assignment. Confirm: no university, employer, or funded research contract that claims rights to this invention. If ownership is 100% inventor (Issac Daniel Davis), no assignment record is needed at filing — can record later if needed.

checklist.text: Broad claim fallbacks and continuation/CIP strategy identified.
checklist.evidence: Strategy finalized in PATENT_CLAIMS_FIXED_v3.md. Filing all 25 claims now, accepting non-provisional date for claims 21/23/24 (which were reformulated to track production code not in original provisional). CIP candidates documented: EMA tau swarm trust, Hopfield energy exact form, trichromatic 10D governance, Tree of Escalation as decider, Sacred Tongues tokenizer as separate application. CIP must be filed before this application issues — track USPTO status after filing.

checklist.text: Spec DOCX accepted by Patent Center DOCX validation tool.
checklist.evidence: Run SCBE_NONPROVISIONAL_SPEC_v1.docx through Patent Center validator before filing. Common failures: non-Times-New-Roman font, line spacing, margins, page numbers in wrong location. Tool is at patentcenter.uspto.gov > Tools > DOCX Validator. Run AFTER applying spec_docx_whereby_updated fixes.

checklist.text: Provisional filing receipt saved to patent-workbench/uploads/.
checklist.evidence: uploads/ is empty. Export acknowledgment PDF for 63/961,403 from Patent Center and save here as evidence freeze. Not required for filing the non-provisional, but good housekeeping.

checklist.text: Materials reviewed: no credentials, private keys, private addresses, or unrelated personal records in uploads.
checklist.evidence: uploads/ is currently empty. Before placing any file in uploads/, verify it contains only patent-related material. Do not upload .env files, API keys, personal financial records, or medical records.

checklist.text: USPTO fees verified on filing day.
checklist.evidence: Estimate: $640 micro-entity (26 claims: $400 base + 6 extra x $40 = $240). Verify current rates at USPTO fee schedule on filing day — fees can change. Pay in Patent Center at submission.

blocking_before_submission: ads_address_filled — fill in street address, zip, phone directly in Patent Center ADS form
docx_validated — upload SCBE_NONPROVISIONAL_SPEC_v1.docx to patentcenter.uspto.gov > Tools > DOCX Validator
fees_rechecked — verify $640 micro-entity total (26 claims) on USPTO fee schedule on filing day
important_but_not_blocking: spec_claim_support_checked — verify Detailed Description covers REROUTE and null-space anomaly by name
prior_art_logged — IDS should be filed if you found relevant art
drawings_complete — spot-check FIG coverage of independent claim elements
